original_image_tags: In the top left corner, a small black-and-white photograph shows a dark, disc-shaped object against a dark background. The object has a central light or hole and appears metallic.

elements.description: One small, dark, square graphic located at the top left of the page. It depicts a stylized, shadowed silhouette resembling a flying saucer or disc-shaped craft against a dark background.

judge.reason: The descriptions contradict each other on the category of the visual element (photograph vs. graphic), the shape of the object (disc-shaped vs. square graphic), and the nature of the depicted object (metallic disc vs. stylized silhouette).
